claim_title: Additional numbered pipeline steps are not called by runner

results.description: Ensure four extra step files exist and are absent from runner invocations.
results.command: present=0; for s in 00_prepare_processed_data.py 01_compute_residual_migration.py 01b_compute_convergence.py 01c_compute_mortality_improvement.py; do [ -f "scripts/pipeline/$s" ] && present=$((present+1)); done; called=$(rg -n "00_prepare_processed_data.py|01_compute_residual_migration.py|01b_compute_convergence.py|01c_compute_mortality_improvement.py" scripts/pipeline/run_complete_pipeline.sh | wc -l); echo "EXTRA_STEPS_PRESENT=$present"; echo "EXTRA_STEPS_CALLED=$called"; if [ "$present" -eq 4 ] && [ "$called" -eq 0 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
